name_he: חליטת ערב להרגעה ושינה
ingredients: Chamomile flowers; Lemon balm leaves (optional); Lavender flowers (optional); Oat drink or water
preparation: Steep 1 tea bag or 1-2 tsp dried chamomile in 200-250 ml just-boiled water for 5-10 minutes. Optionally add 1 tsp dried lemon balm and/or 0.5-1 tsp dried lavender. Drink 30-60 minutes before sleep.
frequency_duration: 1 cup in the evening, daily for 2-4 weeks
evidence_summary: Chamomile oral preparations improved generalized anxiety and showed signals for better sleep in RCTs. Lemon balm extracts improved sleep quality and reduced anxiety in several clinical trials. Lavender herbal tea and aromatherapy improved sleep and reduced anxiety/depression in women and elderly populations.
primary_refs: PMC3600416; pubmed/19593179; e-cnr.org/journal/view.php?number=343; PMC11510126; sciencedirect.com/article/abs/pii/S1876382018309892; digitalcommons.pcom.edu/pa_systematic_reviews/330; semanticscholar lavender tea sleep

name_he: משקה היביסקוס קר ללחץ דם
ingredients: Dried hibiscus calyces; Water; Optional: lemon juice; Small amount of non-sugar sweetener or small amount of honey/date syrup
preparation: Steep 1-2 tbsp dried hibiscus in 500 ml hot water for 10-15 minutes, then strain and chill. Add lemon juice to taste and minimal sweetener if desired.
frequency_duration: 1-2 cups daily for 4-8 weeks
evidence_summary: Hibiscus sabdariffa teas lowered systolic and diastolic blood pressure in multiple RCTs and meta-analyses, with modest effects on fasting glucose and lipids.
primary_refs: PMC6621350; ars.usda.gov hibiscus tea lowers blood pressure; Wiley sour tea meta-analysis; PMC9086798

name_he: משקה עיכול – נענע וג׳ינג׳ר
ingredients: Fresh or dried peppermint leaves; Fresh ginger root slices; Lemon slice (optional)
preparation: Place 5-10 fresh peppermint leaves (or 1-2 tsp dried) and 2-3 thin ginger slices in 250 ml boiling water. Steep 5-10 minutes and drink warm, preferably after meals.
frequency_duration: 1 cup after main meals, up to 2-3 times per day
evidence_summary: Enteric-coated peppermint oil capsules significantly improved IBS symptoms in multiple RCTs and meta-analyses. Ginger reduced nausea in post-operative, pregnancy and chemotherapy settings in systematic reviews of RCTs. Infusion provides lower doses but combines both actives.
primary_refs: pubmed/26319955; pubmed/24100754; jmsh.ac.in peppermint oil IBS; pubmed/10793599; asco ginger chemotherapy trial; PMC6341159

name_he: לאטה קקאו ושיבולת שועל ללב ולמוח
ingredients: Unsweetened cocoa powder; Oat drink rich in beta-glucan; Cinnamon; Small amount of sweetener if needed
preparation: Heat 200-250 ml oat drink. Whisk in 1-2 tsp unsweetened cocoa powder and 0.5 tsp cinnamon until smooth. Do not boil strongly; serve warm.
frequency_duration: 1 cup daily, long term
evidence_summary: Oat beta-glucan beverages (≥3 g/day) reduce LDL cholesterol by about 5–7% in RCTs. Cocoa flavanols acutely improve cerebral blood flow, endothelial function and aspects of cognitive performance in controlled trials. Cinnamon supplementation modestly improves fasting glucose and insulin resistance in T2DM.
primary_refs: PMC6892284; frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fnut.2019.00171; pubmed/34236436; nature.com/articles/s41598-020-76160-9; sciencedirect.com/article/pii/S0531556520300516; pubmed/37818728; PMC7728608

name_he: לאטה כורכום-ג׳ינג׳ר (חלב זהוב)
ingredients: Turmeric powder; Fresh grated ginger; Black pepper; Oat or soy drink; Small amount of fat (e.g., tahini or small amount of oil)
preparation: Heat 200-250 ml plant drink with 0.5-1 tsp turmeric, 0.5 tsp fresh grated ginger and a pinch of black pepper. Simmer gently 5 minutes while stirring; optionally add 1 tsp tahini or a few drops of oil to improve curcumin absorption.
frequency_duration: 1 cup daily for at least 4-8 weeks
evidence_summary: Curcumin supplements showed moderate reductions in depressive symptoms in patients with major depressive disorder and reduced inflammatory markers in several RCTs and meta-analyses. Ginger has anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects in some musculoskeletal conditions.
primary_refs: wiley.com/ptr.5524; PMC7728608; PMC8863697; frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fphar.2025.1638645; PMC6341159

name_he: תה ירוק עם רוזמרין לפוקוס וזיכרון
ingredients: Green tea leaves or bag; Small sprig of fresh rosemary or 0.25-0.5 tsp dried; Lemon slice (optional)
preparation: Steep 1 tsp green tea and a small sprig of rosemary (or 0.25-0.5 tsp dried) in 200 ml water at ~80 °C for 3-4 minutes, then remove leaves/herb.
frequency_duration: 1-2 cups in the morning or early afternoon
evidence_summary: Green tea (caffeine + L-theanine) improves working memory performance and modulates brain activity in human trials. A rosemary-containing tomato juice drink and beverages with rosemary showed acute improvements in speed of memory, alertness and contentedness in older adults.
primary_refs: pubmed/28899506; kcl.ac.uk green tea cognition PDF; frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fnagi.2022.919766; liebertpub.com/jmf.2011.0005; mccormickscienceinstitute.com rosemary and cognitive function; neurosci7010015

name_he: מרק עדשים אנטי-דלקתי
ingredients: Red or brown lentils; Onion; Garlic; Carrot; Celery; Turmeric; Ginger; Rosemary or sage; Olive oil; Salt and pepper
preparation: Sauté chopped onion and 2-3 minced garlic cloves in 1-2 tbsp olive oil. Add 1-2 tsp turmeric, 1 tsp grated ginger and 0.5 tsp chopped rosemary or sage and toast briefly. Add 1 cup lentils, chopped carrot and celery, and 1.5-2 liters water or vegetable stock. Simmer 30-40 minutes until lentils are soft.
frequency_duration: 1 bowl daily or several times per week as part of meals
evidence_summary: Garlic preparations modestly reduce blood pressure and improve lipids in hypertensive patients. Turmeric/curcumin and ginger have anti-inflammatory effects. Legume-based soups support weight management and glycemic control in observational and intervention studies.
primary_refs: PMC8031974; frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fnut.2025.1656809; PMC7728608; PMC6341159

name_he: משקה קינמון ושיבולת שועל לאיזון סוכר
ingredients: Fine oats; Cinnamon powder (preferably Ceylon); Water or unsweetened oat/soy drink
preparation: Cook 2-3 tbsp fine oats in 200-250 ml water or plant drink for 3-5 minutes to make a thin porridge-like drink. Stir in 0.5-1 tsp cinnamon at the end and serve warm.
frequency_duration: Once daily with breakfast for at least 8-12 weeks
evidence_summary: Cinnamon supplementation in T2DM modestly reduced fasting glucose, HOMA-IR and sometimes lipids in meta-analyses. Oat beta-glucan lowers LDL cholesterol and improves some features of metabolic syndrome.
primary_refs: pubmed/37818728; PMC3767714; nutritionreviews 83(2):249 cinnamon; PMC6892284; frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fnut.2019.00171

name_he: תה צמחים משולב לשינה ושקט נפשי
name_en: Mixed herbal sleep and calm tea
ingredients: Chamomile; Lemon balm; Lavender; Optional: small amount of valerian root if available
preparation: Combine 1 tsp chamomile, 1 tsp lemon balm and 0.5 tsp lavender in a tea infuser with 250 ml boiling water. Steep 10 minutes. Optionally add a small amount of valerian root according to product instructions.
frequency_duration: 1 cup in the evening, up to 2 cups/day for several weeks
evidence_summary: A combination of lemon balm and valerian as tablets improved sleep quality and reduced insomnia indices in RCTs. Lemon balm monotherapy reduced anxiety and improved sleep in several clinical settings. Lavender herbal tea improved sleep quality in elderly and reduced anxiety/depression scores in some trials.
primary_refs: PMC11510126; scholarsresearchlibrary.com lemon balm sleep; sciencedirect.com/article/abs/pii/S1876382018309892; semanticscholar lavender herbal tea elderly; sciencedirect.com/article/abs/pii/S0965229919316292

name_he: משקה עגבניות ורוזמרין לקשב וזיכרון
ingredients: Low-sodium tomato juice; Dried rosemary powder
preparation: Mix 250-300 ml reduced-sodium tomato juice with approximately 750 mg (about 1/4 tsp) dried rosemary powder. Stir well and drink once, preferably with a light meal.
frequency_duration: Single-dose use before demanding cognitive tasks; in studies used acutely
evidence_summary: A randomized crossover study in older adults showed that a tomato juice drink containing 750 mg dried rosemary improved speed of memory compared with placebo, whereas higher doses impaired performance.
primary_refs: liebertpub.com/jmf.2011.0005; mccormickscienceinstitute.com rosemary and cognitive function; Annex Publishers Cognitive Enhancers Derived from Edible Crops

name_he: משקה זרעי פשתן ולימון ללחץ דם
ingredients: Ground flaxseed; Water; Lemon juice; Optional: small amount of honey
preparation: Mix 1 tbsp freshly ground flaxseed into 250 ml room-temperature or slightly warm water. Add juice of half a lemon and minimal honey if desired. Stir well and drink soon so the mucilage does not fully gel.
frequency_duration: 1 glass daily with a meal for at least 8-12 weeks
evidence_summary: Meta-analyses and RCTs show flaxseed products modestly reduce systolic and diastolic blood pressure and may improve total cholesterol in hypertensive or high-risk individuals.
primary_refs: PMC11543448; pubmed/26071633; sciencedirect.com/article/pii/S1550830721000938; koreascience.kr flaxseed meta-analysis

name_he: מיץ רימונים מדולל ללב ולחץ דם
ingredients: 100% pomegranate juice; Water
preparation: Dilute 100-150 ml 100% pomegranate juice with an equal volume of water (to reduce sugar load) and drink with or between meals.
frequency_duration: 1 glass daily for up to 1-2 months
evidence_summary: Systematic reviews and meta-analyses of RCTs show that up to ~300 ml/day pomegranate juice for ≤2 months reduces systolic and diastolic blood pressure by around 4-6 mmHg in various populations.
primary_refs: onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1002/ptr.7952; pubmed/27888156; sciencedirect.com/article/S2405457718300172; PMC5672313

name_he: שייק אוכמניות ושיבולת שועל לקוגניציה
ingredients: Frozen or fresh blueberries; Oat drink or water + oats; Banana or apple; Ground flaxseed (optional)
preparation: Blend 1 cup blueberries, 200 ml oat drink (or water + 2 tbsp oats), half a banana or 1 small apple, and 1 tbsp ground flaxseed until smooth.
frequency_duration: 1 smoothie daily for 8-12 weeks
evidence_summary: Blueberry juice or freeze-dried powder improved verbal memory and some executive functions in randomized controlled trials in older adults and midlife individuals, with trends toward better mood and glucose control.
primary_refs: PMC2850944; sciencedirect.com/article/pii/S0889159118311954; blueberry.org cognitive function trial; PMC9031005

name_he: מים בתוספת אוכמניות ולימון (הידרציה פלוס)
ingredients: Still water; Handful of blueberries; Lemon slices
preparation: Place a handful of blueberries and 2-3 lemon slices in a 1-liter bottle of water and let infuse in the fridge for several hours. Drink throughout the day.
frequency_duration: Up to 1-2 liters/day as main hydration source
evidence_summary: Hydration RCTs show that restoring water intake after restriction improves cognitive performance and mood. Blueberries add polyphenols that may benefit memory and executive function in the long term.

name_he: שייק ירוק פשוט (תרד, בננה, שיבולת שועל)
ingredients: Fresh spinach; Banana; Oat drink or water + oats; Lemon juice
preparation: Blend 1-2 handfuls fresh spinach, 1 banana, 200 ml oat drink (or water + 2 tbsp oats) and a splash of lemon juice until smooth.
frequency_duration: 1 smoothie daily or several times per week
evidence_summary: Green leafy vegetables, whole grains and plant-based dietary patterns are consistently associated with lower cardiometabolic risk and slower cognitive decline in cohort studies, forming the basis of patterns like the Mediterranean and MIND diets.
primary_refs: PLOS herbs and spices benefits; observational data on Mediterranean/MIND diets (e.g., Morris et al., 2015); nutritionreviews polyphenols and cognition

name_he: משקה סלק ולימון לפני פעילות
ingredients: Beetroot juice (or cooked beetroot blended with water); Lemon juice
preparation: Use 200-250 ml commercial beetroot juice or blend 1 small cooked beetroot with water to 250 ml and add lemon juice. Drink 1.5-2 h before exercise.
frequency_duration: Before aerobic sessions, a few times per week
evidence_summary: Nitrate-rich beetroot juice lowers central systolic blood pressure by ~5 mmHg acutely and can enhance cardiovascular responses to submaximal exercise in hypertensive and other populations.
primary_refs: PMC3545899; PMC6369216; PMC6413851; sciencedirect.com/article/abs/pii/S0891584923011401

name_he: תערובת זרעי צ׳יה ופשתן ליוגורט/דייסה
name_en: Chia-flax topping for porridge or plant yogurt
ingredients: Ground flaxseed; Whole chia seeds; Crushed walnuts (optional)
preparation: Mix 1 tsp ground flaxseed with 1 tsp chia seeds (and 1 tbsp crushed walnuts if desired) and sprinkle over oat porridge or unsweetened soy/oat yogurt.
frequency_duration: Once daily with breakfast
evidence_summary: Flaxseed meta-analyses show modest reductions in blood pressure and cholesterol; walnuts and chia contribute plant omega-3 and polyphenols, with walnuts showing possible benefit in subgroups for cognitive decline risk.

name_he: סלט עדשים קר עם ירקות ושמן זית
ingredients: Cooked lentils; Tomato; Cucumber; Red onion; Parsley; Olive oil; Lemon juice; Garlic
preparation: Mix 1-2 cups cooked lentils with chopped tomato, cucumber, red onion and parsley. Dress with 1-2 tbsp olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, salt and pepper.
frequency_duration: As a main or side dish several times per week
evidence_summary: Legumes and extra-virgin olive oil are core components of Mediterranean-style diets that reduce cardiovascular events and improve metabolic risk factors in large RCTs and cohorts.
primary_refs: PREDIMED trial reports; PMC8031974 garlic BP; Mediterranean diet RCTs (Estruch et al., 2013)

name_he: מרק ירקות בסיסי עם שום ושיבולת שועל
name_en: Basic vegetable soup with garlic and oat
ingredients: Onion; Garlic; Carrot; Celery; Zucchini; Handful of oats; Olive oil; Herbs (parsley, thyme)
preparation: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil, add chopped vegetables and 1-2 tbsp oats, cover with water and simmer 25-30 minutes. Season with herbs.
frequency_duration: 1 bowl daily or a few times per week
evidence_summary: Vegetable-rich, high-fiber soups improve satiety and help weight and metabolic control; oats add beta-glucan for LDL reduction and garlic supports blood pressure and lipids.
primary_refs: PMC6892284; frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fnut.2019.00171; PMC8031974; Mediterranean-style dietary pattern data

name_he: תה ירוק, לימון ומנטה (אנרגיה עדינה)
name_en: Green tea lemon-mint light energy drink
ingredients: Green tea; Fresh mint; Lemon juice
preparation: Steep green tea with a handful of fresh mint leaves in 200 ml hot water (80 °C) for 3-4 minutes. Add lemon juice and optionally chill for iced tea.
frequency_duration: 1-2 cups in the morning or early afternoon
evidence_summary: Green tea improves aspects of cognition and mood, while mint-derived preparations reduce IBS symptoms; lemon adds palatability and vitamin C without specific RCTs for this mix.

name_he: משקה מים לפי משקל גוף (הידרציה מובנית)
ingredients: Plain water
preparation: Guideline: aim for approximately 30-35 ml water per kg body weight per day from beverages and high-water foods, adjusting for climate and activity. Spread intake over the day.
frequency_duration: Daily, long term
evidence_summary: RCTs and reviews on hydration show that mild dehydration (1-2% body water loss) can impair attention, reaction time and mood, and that water supplementation after restriction improves these outcomes.

name_he: חליטת מרווה ולימונית למיקוד רגוע
ingredients: Dried sage leaves; Lemon balm leaves; Optional: small amount of honey
preparation: Steep 0.5-1 tsp dried sage and 1 tsp dried lemon balm in 200 ml boiling water for 5-7 minutes.
frequency_duration: Up to 2 cups/day
evidence_summary: Sage extracts improved working memory and attention in RCTs, while lemon balm reduced anxiety and improved sleep and general calmness in clinical trials.
primary_refs: PMC7828691; pubmed/33466627; PMC11510126; sciencedirect.com/article/abs/pii/S1876382018309892

name_he: מים עם חומץ תפוחים ולימון לפני ארוחה
ingredients: Apple cider vinegar; Water; Lemon juice
preparation: Dilute 1-2 tsp apple cider vinegar in 200 ml water with lemon juice. Drink just before or with a high-carbohydrate meal.
frequency_duration: Once daily before largest carb meal
evidence_summary: Small RCTs show that vinegar ingestion with meals blunts postprandial glucose spikes and improves insulin sensitivity in individuals with insulin resistance or type 2 diabetes.
primary_refs: Johnston et al. vinegar glucose trials; nutritionreviews vinegar insulin sensitivity studies

name_he: שייק בוקר מהיר – בננה, שיבולת שועל, שקדים
name_en: Quick breakfast smoothie – banana, oats, almonds
ingredients: Banana; Oats; Almonds or almond butter; Water or almond drink
preparation: Blend 1 banana, 2-3 tbsp oats, 10-15 almonds (or 1 tbsp almond butter) and 200 ml water/almond drink until smooth.
frequency_duration: Once daily as breakfast
evidence_summary: Nuts and whole grains are associated with lower cardiovascular risk and better weight control in cohorts; almonds improve lipid profiles, while oats contribute beta-glucan for LDL reduction.
primary_refs: Prospective nut consumption CV risk studies; PMC6892284; frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fnut.2019.00171

name_he: חטיף תמרים, אגוזים ושקדים
ingredients: Dates; Walnuts; Almonds; Cocoa powder (optional)
preparation: Blend equal parts pitted dates, walnuts and almonds (and 1-2 tbsp cocoa if desired) to a paste, roll into small balls and chill.
frequency_duration: 1-2 small balls per day as snack
evidence_summary: Nut-rich snacks improve dietary quality and cardiometabolic markers; walnuts may help delay cognitive decline in at-risk subgroups; cocoa adds flavanols linked with vascular and cognitive benefits.

name_he: תבשיל חומוס וירקות בשמן זית
ingredients: Cooked chickpeas; Onion; Garlic; Tomato; Zucchini or eggplant; Olive oil; Spices (turmeric, cumin)
preparation: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil, add spices, then chickpeas and chopped vegetables. Add water and simmer until vegetables are soft.
frequency_duration: Main meal several times per week
evidence_summary: Legume- and olive-oil-rich meals form a central part of Mediterranean diets, which reduce cardiovascular events; turmeric adds anti-inflammatory curcumin.
primary_refs: PREDIMED Mediterranean diet; PMC7728608; legume intervention trials

name_he: דייסת שיבולת שועל עם קינמון, תפוח ופשתן
name_en: Oat porridge with cinnamon, apple and flax
ingredients: Oats; Water or plant drink; Apple; Cinnamon; Ground flaxseed
preparation: Cook oats in water or plant drink. In the last minutes add chopped apple, 0.5-1 tsp cinnamon and 1 tbsp ground flaxseed.
frequency_duration: Daily breakfast or several times per week
evidence_summary: Oat beta-glucan lowers LDL and improves metabolic risk factors; cinnamon modestly improves glycemic indices; flaxseed aids blood pressure and lipid control.
primary_refs: PMC6892284; frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fnut.2019.00171; pubmed/37818728; PMC3767714; pubmed/26071633

name_he: תה ג׳ינג׳ר, לימון ודבש לשיעול ובחילה קלה
ingredients: Fresh ginger; Lemon; Honey (optional, vegetarian but not vegan)
preparation: Slice 2-3 thin slices of fresh ginger and steep in 200 ml boiling water for 10 minutes. Add lemon juice and 1-2 tsp honey if desired.
frequency_duration: Up to several cups per day as needed
evidence_summary: Ginger reduces nausea in several RCTs across pregnancy, postoperative and chemotherapy settings. Honey is often used for cough relief, though evidence is mixed; lemon mainly adds palatability.
primary_refs: pubmed/10793599; PMC6341159; oncology ginger trials; pediatric honey cough studies

name_he: משקה שיבולת שועל קריר לפני שינה (ללא קפאין)
ingredients: Oat drink; Cinnamon; Small amount of vanilla; Optional: chamomile extract or tea bag
preparation: Warm or chill 200 ml oat drink with 0.5 tsp cinnamon and a little vanilla. Optionally steep a chamomile tea bag in the warm drink for 5 minutes, then remove.
frequency_duration: 1 cup 30-60 minutes before bedtime
evidence_summary: Chamomile improves anxiety and possibly sleep quality in RCTs; a low-glycemic, warm carbohydrate drink may aid sleep onset and prevent nocturnal hunger.
primary_refs: PMC3600416; pubmed/19593179; e-cnr.org chamomile anxiety; oatmeal sleep observational insights

name_he: משקה בוקר – מים חמימים עם לימון ופוליפנולים
name_en: Morning warm water with lemon and polyphenol add-on
ingredients: Warm water; Lemon juice; Optional: small amount of green tea or hibiscus concentrate
preparation: Combine 200-300 ml warm water with juice of half a lemon. Optionally add a small amount of concentrated cooled green tea or hibiscus infusion for polyphenols.
frequency_duration: Once each morning on waking
evidence_summary: Starting the day with water supports hydration; green tea and hibiscus infusions provide polyphenols associated with improved vascular function and lower blood pressure in RCTs.
